titleStmt.title: SII 38.111: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 111. (A.R. No. 111 of 1912.) TIRUVOṞṞIYŪR, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the west wall, central shrine, Ādhipurīśvara temple.

summary.p: It begins with the meykīrtti of the king, Pugaḻmādu viḷaṅga etc;

It records a gift of ninety sheep by Chōḻaṉśōṟuḍaiyāḷ alias Kāḍavaṉ Mahādēvi, the queen of the Chōḻa ruler Kulōttuṅga Chōḷadēva, in order to burn a perpetual lamp to the deity at Tiruvoṟṟiyūr in Puḻal-nāḍu in Rājēndraśōḻa-vaḷanāḍu (a sub-division) of Jayaṅkoṇḍachōḷa-maṇḍalam.

Four shepherds of the locality, Tribhuvanasundara-chēri, Piḷḷai Subrahmaṇṇiyaṉ, Paṇpaḷakāvaṉ alias Paḍampakkanāyakkakōṉ, Vāṇaṉ Tiruppori and Saṅgaṉ Tirunīlakaṇṭan received the above gift and agreed to measure out an uḻakku of ghee, daily by the measure Arumoḻidēvaṉ to the temple servants.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . �
pukaḻmātu viḷaṅkaccayamātu virumpa nilamaka
ṇilava malarmakaḷ puṇara Urimaiyiṟ ciṟanta maṇimuṭi
cūṭi villavar nilaikeṭa miṉavar kulaitara vikkalar ciṅkaṇar
melkaṭal pāyat tikkaṉaittun=taṉ cakkara naṭātti vijayabhiṣekam
paṇṇip puvanamuḻutuṭaiyaāḷoṭum virasiṁhāsanattu viṟṟirun=taru
ḷiya koviraājakecarivarmarāna cakravattikaḷ śrī kulottuṅka co
ḻadevarkku yāṇṭu patineṭṭāvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭa
lattu rājentracoḻavaḷanāṭṭup puḻalnāṭṭut tiruvoṟṟi
yūr Uṭaiyārkku cakravattikaḷ śrī kulottuṅkacoḻadevar
nampirāṭṭiyār coḻaṉcoṟuṭaiyāḷārāna kāṭavaṉ mahā
deviyār vaitta tirunan=tāviḷakkoṉṟu Ivviḷakkoṉṟum
Erippataṟku vaitta cāvāmuvāp perāṭu toṇṇūṟu Ivvāṭu toṇ
ṇūṟuṅ kaikkoṇṭom Ivvūrt tiripuvaṉacun=taricceriRead as tiripuvaṉacun=taracceri maṉṟāṭikaḷi
lp piḷḷai cuppiramaṇṇiyaneṉum paṇpaḷakāvaṉāna paṭampakkaṉā
yakakkoṉum vāṇaṉ tirupporiyum caṅkaṉ tirunilakaṇṭaṉum Iñ
ñālvem nāḷoṉṟiṉukku ney Arumoḻitevaṉāl Uḻakkākat ti
ruvoṟṟiyūruṭaiyār tevakaṉmikaḷ vacam Aḷakkakkaṭavomāṉom .
Digital edition of SII 38.111 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
